task: Define outcome labeling contracts and point-in-time rules
acceptance_criteria: Raw outcome formulas horizons and data-quality semantics are explicit in domain contracts
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests/test_technical_decision_observability_labeling.py finance-agent-core/tests/test_technical_decision_observability_registry.py finance-agent-core/tests/test_technical_import_hygiene_guard.py -q && uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m ruff check finance-agent-core/src/agents/technical/subdomains/decision_observability finance-agent-core/src/infrastructure/models.py finance-agent-core/tests/test_technical_decision_observability_labeling.py
notes: Added phase-2 labeling contracts, horizon resolution, outcome calculations, repository seams for unresolved-event fetch and append-only outcome writes, plus a uniqueness guard on event_id + labeling_method_version.

task: Implement repository and worker runtime for matured-event labeling
acceptance_criteria: Worker can fetch matured events read market data and append raw outcome rows idempotently
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q
notes: Completed with `TechnicalDecisionObservabilityRuntimeService`, labeling-specific market-data reader policy, worker facade, and focused worker tests. Repo-wide pytest remains baseline-red outside this slice, so completion is based on focused changed-path validation.

task: Add scheduler-facing one-off command and container runtime hooks
acceptance_criteria: Labeling can run as a one-off command suitable for a dedicated supercronic-driven scheduler container
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q
notes: Added one-off script, supercronic crontab, Dockerfile install hook, entrypoint command override, and a compose scheduler service behind the `scheduler` profile. Validated with script help output, shell syntax, and `docker compose --profile scheduler config --services`.

task: Add idempotency provider-degraded and cache-isolation tests
acceptance_criteria: Delayed labeling is covered for success degraded and replay scenarios
validation_command: uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m pytest finance-agent-core/tests -q && uv run --project finance-agent-core python -m ruff check finance-agent-core/src/agents/technical
notes: Focused tests now cover success path, unmatured skip, provider degraded handling, existing-row skip semantics, market-data cache namespace forwarding, and one-off script batch summary output. Changed-path ruff and focused pytest both passed.
